summary: Dashboard fails brand palette consistency with generic gray/blue authenticated UI instead of diner brand palette. Email verification banner present but overall visual treatment contradicts manifesto requirements.

violations.description: Logged-in dashboard uses generic gray/blue palette (#2c3e50 sidebar, standard grays) instead of diner brand palette (teal #9fd8d2, cream #fff8ea, ink #1f1b18). Creates brand discontinuity after login.
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of required diner palette surfaces. Should use cream #fff8ea for main content area, not white/gray.
Signed-in app chrome uses generic blue/gray system that bleeds into authenticated space, violating separation between public marketing palette and app chrome.

actions: Apply diner brand palette to authenticated dashboard: cream backgrounds, teal accents, ink borders
Replace generic sidebar styling with brand-consistent navigation treatment
Ensure brand continuity between public marketing surfaces and post-login experience
